questions.question: What does '12.1 to 12.8' refer to in the context of Arrays?
options: The number of elements in a one-dimensional array
The number of rows in a two-dimensional array
The number of columns in a two-dimensional array
The total number of elements in a two-dimensional array

To specify the size of the array before initialization
To initialize all elements of the array with a default value
To declare a pointer to an array
